article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.9. CC - Archaelogical Consulting Services 2026-02-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on $700,000 contract extension for archaeological consulting services
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on adding $700,000 to an existing contract with Campfire Archaeology and Heritage Ltd. to continue providing archaeological consulting services for City construction projects and Indigenous reconciliation commitments.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — this could affect contracts if you work in construction or consulting in Burnaby.
